variables.title: Variables
variables.createFirstVariable: Create your first variable to get started.
variables.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this variable?
variables.name: Name
variables.nameHelp: Must start with a letter or underscore, followed by letters, numbers, or underscores.
variables.helpDefaultValue: Optional: Initial value for the variable.
variables.helpPositionTag: Select a position tag from the list. The selected tag ID will be stored.
variables.helpSceneObject: Select a scene object from the list. The selected object ID will be stored.
variables.helpPosition: Enter position as JSON with x, y, z, alpha, beta, gamma properties.
variables.loadingErrorDescription: We couldn't load your variables. This might be due to a network issue or server problem.
variables.noVariablesForProcedure: No variables defined for this procedure.
variables.selectProcedureToManage: Select or create a procedure to manage its variables
variables.invalidName: Invalid name. Must start with a letter or underscore, followed by letters, numbers, or underscores.
variables.duplicateName: Variable with this name already exists

procedures.selectToLoad: Please select a procedure to load

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your application preferences and settings
settings.generalDescription: Configure general application settings and preferences.
settings.graphqlDescription: Configure GraphQL endpoint and connection settings.
settings.appearanceDescription: Configure theme and UI appearance preferences.
settings.notificationsDescription: Show system notifications for important events.
settings.settingsManagementDescription: Export, import, or reset all application settings.
settings.resetAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults? This cannot be undone.
settings.settingsImportError: Failed to import settings. Please check the file format.
settings.graphqlEndpointDescription: The GraphQL server endpoint for queries, mutations, and subscriptions.
settings.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Please check your endpoints.
settings.endpointsValid: Endpoints are valid. Save settings to test connection.
settings.endpointsInvalid: Invalid endpoint URLs. Please check your configuration.
settings.themeDescription: Choose your preferred color theme or set to auto to follow your system preferences.
settings.reduceMotionDescription: Minimize animations and transitions for better accessibility.
settings.showEdgeLabelsDescription: Show FS, SS, SF, FF labels on dependency arrows.

modals.name: Name

modals.skillExecutionDurationDescription: The duration of the skill execution in milliseconds.
modals.noConfigurableProperties: No configurable properties for this skill.
modals.selectCompatibleSkill: Select a skill compatible with the chosen agent.
modals.selectCompatibleAgent: Select an agent compatible with the chosen skill.
modals.loadingSkillsErrorDescription: Unable to load the skills list. Agents can still be saved without skill assignments.

errors.backendUnreachableDescription: The backend server is not running or not accessible. Please check the following:
errors.backendConnectionFailedDescription: Cannot connect to the backend server. Please ensure the server is running and try again.
errors.failedToLoadProceduresDescription: Unable to retrieve the procedure list. Please try again.
errors.failedToLoadAgentsDescription: We couldn't load your agents. This might be due to a network issue or server problem.
errors.failedToLoadSkillsDescription: We couldn't load your skills. This might be due to a network issue or server problem.
errors.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this {{type}}?
errors.branchConditionRequired: At least one branch must have a condition

flowErrors.loadingErrorDescription: We couldn't fetch the data for your procedure. This might be due to a network issue or server problem. Please try again later.
flowErrors.missingNodeDataDescription: No nodes data was returned from the server. Please try again later.

help.title: Help & Documentation
help.subtitle: Learn how to use the application and troubleshoot common issues

gettingStartedHelp.title: Getting Started
gettingStartedHelp.description: Welcome to the Flow Visualization Application for managing robotic tasks, skills, and agents.

keyFeaturesList.visualFlowEditor: Visual flow editor for task orchestration

navigationList.flowEditorDescription: Main canvas for creating and editing workflows
navigationList.managementDescription: Configure agents, skills, position tags, and scene objects

quickStartSteps.step1: Start by creating your first agent in the Management section
quickStartSteps.step2: Define skills that your agents can perform
quickStartSteps.step3: Use the Flow Editor to create task workflows
quickStartSteps.step4: Run your procedures and monitor progress in real-time

flowEditorHelp.title: Flow Editor
flowEditorHelp.description: Learn how to use the visual flow editor to create and manage robotic workflows.

creatingTasksList.addTask: Click the "Task" button in the toolbar to add a new task
creatingTasksList.configureTask: Configure task properties in the modal dialog
creatingTasksList.addDependencies: Add dependencies to define your workflow

addingSkillsList.addSkill: Use the "Skill" button to add executable skills to your flow
addingSkillsList.skillsRepresent: Skills represent specific actions your agents can perform
addingSkillsList.connectSkills: Connect skills or tasks to define execution order

flowEditorHelp.timelineViewDescription: The timeline shows the temporal flow of your procedure. Use it to understand the sequence and timing of operations in your workflow.

keyboardShortcutsList.paste: Paste copied/cut node (as child of selected node if any)

managementHelp.title: Management
managementHelp.description: Learn how to manage agents, skills, position tags, and scene objects.

agentManagementList.assignColors: Assign representative colors for visual identification

skillManagementList.defineSkills: Define skills that agents can perform
skillManagementList.setupDependencies: Set up skill dependencies and requirements

positionTagsList.createPositions: Create named positions in your workspace
positionTagsList.referencePositions: Reference positions in tasks and skills

sceneObjectsList.defineObjects: Define objects that agents can interact with

troubleshootingHelp.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshootingHelp.description: Common issues and solutions to help you resolve problems quickly.

connectionSolutions.checkServer: Check that the backend server is running on http://localhost:5095
connectionSolutions.verifyNetwork: Verify network connectivity and firewall settings
connectionSolutions.restartServer: Restart the development server with npm run dev

performanceSolutions.checkConsole: Check browser console for errors or warnings
performanceSolutions.reduceAnimation: Reduce animation speed in appearance settings
performanceSolutions.clearCache: Clear browser cache and refresh the page
performanceSolutions.closeTabs: Close unused browser tabs to free memory

dataSolutions.refreshPage: Refresh the page to reload data from server
dataSolutions.checkLogs: Check GraphQL server logs for errors
dataSolutions.verifyDatabase: Verify database connectivity on the backend
dataSolutions.clearAppCache: Clear application cache in browser settings

troubleshootingHelp.gettingHelpDescription: If you continue experiencing issues, check the browser console for error messages and contact the development team with specific error details.

properties.transformExpressionHelp: Optional JavaScript expression to transform the value during binding
